CC 2.1.207–208 adoption-issue reconciliation

7 cc-adoption issues auto-filed by cc-release-watch. Every one resolves to no-op / N-A for ork — verified against each issue's changelog reference. This PR closes them and resets cc-adoption-gaps.json from its parse_failed 2.1.208 state.

4
No-op (grep=0)
2
N/A (cloud-only)
1
Manual triage done
0
ork code changes

Full per-issue evidence in docs/audits/cc-adoption-2.1.207-208-triage-2026-07-14.md. The "Affected skills" in each auto-filed issue are keyword-match false positives (~60% expected). No skill required an edit. Adoption PR: #2870 (latest_known 2.1.206 → 2.1.208, floor frozen).
